front: Song: 'With a capital T / that rhymes with P / that stands for Pool!'
Song: Leroy Anderson wrote a popular arrangement of this signature song from The Music Man
Musical: features a teenage couple, Tommy Djilas and Zaneeta, seeing each other secretly
Musical: a woman kisses Charlie Cowell to delay him from delivering evidence to Mayor Shinn
Musical: the lisping child Winthrop Paroo sings 'Gary, Indiana' in this musical
Musical: features a barbershop quartet (the Buffalo Bills) who sing 'how can there be any sin in sincere'
Musical: the con man protagonist avoids revealing his teaching degree by instead teaching the barbershop quartet
Song: this opening number is set on a moving train and features the repeated line 'but he doesn't know the territory!'
Song: a girl who waits to kiss until the third date is called this name
Song: characters declare 'You ought to give Iowa a Try!' in this song from The Music Man
Musical: this musical by Meredith Willson is set in River City, Iowa
Musical: the making of this musical is the subject of the book But He Doesn't Know the Territory
